home.heroTitle: Check links before you trust them
home.heroSubtitle: LinkGuard runs automated signals and threat intelligence to produce a risk score — with clear explanations and next steps.
home.step1: Normalize the URL and read its structure.
home.step2: Run technical heuristics (TLS, host shape, entropy, typosquatting hints).
home.step3: Query Google Safe Browsing when configured.
home.step4: Combine signals into a weighted score with plain-language guidance.
home.rateHint: Guests: 3 scans per UTC day per network. Sign in to keep scan history.
result.title: Scan result
result.missing: No scan loaded. Go back and analyze a URL.
result.signInToSave: Sign in to save favorites and history.
result.rateLimited: Guest limit reached. Sign in to continue.
auth.clerkMissing: Add VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to client/.env to enable authentication.
dashboard.title: Your scans
dashboard.empty: No scans yet. Run your first check from Home.
admin.title: Administration
admin.empty: No users synced yet. Sign in once to create your user row, then promote to admin in the database for MVP.
admin.inviteSent: Invite recorded (wire Clerk API for production).
footer.note: LinkGuard never claims a link is 100% safe.
